name: quicknote
title: QuickNote
description: Quickly append notes to a daily Markdown file locally or over SSH.
author: owensmith

commands.name: quicknote
commands.title: QuickNote
commands.description: Append a note to today's daily Markdown file over SSH.

preferences.name: localFolder
preferences.title: Local Notes Folder
preferences.description: Used when Storage is Local, e.g. ~/Notes

preferences.name: sshTarget
preferences.title: SSH Target
preferences.description: Used when Storage is SSH, e.g. hermes or hermes@hermes-pc

preferences.name: remoteFolder
preferences.title: Remote Notes Folder
preferences.description: Used when Storage is SSH; Windows path on the SSH host
